pqr_criteria.criteria: The bidder must have an average annual turnover of at least INR 50 Crores for the last three financial years.
The bidder must be an original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or an authorized dealer of the tendered items.
The supplied transformers must comply with IS 2026 and IEC 60076 standards.
The bidder's manufacturing facility must be located within 200 km of the delivery site in Bangalore.
The bidder must not have been blacklisted by any government entity in the last 5 years.
The bidder must have experience in successfully completing at least three similar projects of value not less than INR 20 Crores each in the last five years.
The net worth of the bidder should be positive for the last three financial years.
The product must have ISO 9001:2015 certification for quality management.
